fields.产品名称: Kitchen baking supplies cookie wood embossed rolling pin
fields.简要说明: Our embossing baking rolling pin with design is a perfect kitchen utensil, great for party or festivals.Rush service is available.
fields.完整描述: This festival-themed rolling pin is a delightful addition to any kitchen, especially during the festive season. Measuring 16.9" in length and 2" in diameter, it features charming patterns deeply engraved into durable hardwood. The natural wood construction ensures safety and eco-friendliness. Each piece is unique, with variations in texture, color, and occasional knots that highlight its natural beauty. The rolling pin's comfortable, easy-grip handles make it a joy to use, providing smooth rolling for pasta, cookie dough, pastry, pizza, and more. Its smooth, non-stick surface ensures dough doesn't cling, making cleanup a breeze. With customizable patterns, this rolling pin brings joy and love to the holidays, such as christmas, halloween and more. Please contact us for details.
